DECON™ FORECAST

Current Oil Condition
◎

Select an oil type and treatment, enter at least one measurement, then click Run Prediction.

Fluitec International — GL combined dataset — 104 DECON AO turbine + 33 DECON turbine + 28 DECON hydraulic pairs  ·  Predictions are simulation estimates — validate against laboratory analysis before field application  ·  Model cache:

This output is an estimate generated by a predictive model built on before-and-after results of a broad range of mineral and synthetic turbine oils, and hydraulic oils from major global lubricant brands. It is provided for planning and illustrative purposes only and does not constitute a performance guarantee. Actual field results will vary with the mode of oil degradation, lubricant formulation, system design, and application conditions. Please consult a Fluitec technical representative for your specific application.
